name: DSS, INC.
summary: DSS, Inc. operates four business segments globally with primary operations in North America and Asia. Its Product Packaging division (Premier Packaging Corp.) manufactures folding cartons, mailers, and document security printing. Its Biotechnology division develops therapeutic drug platforms, sugar substitutes, and fragrances. Commercial Lending provides business credit and financing solutions. Securities and Investment Management includes broker-dealer activities, investment advisory, and healthcare real estate investment.

products.name: Custom Folding Cartons
products.description: Sophisticated custom folding cartons, mailers, photo sleeves, and 3D direct mail solutions for consumer packaging markets.

products.name: Universal Therapeutic Drug Platform
products.description: Research-stage universal therapeutic drug platform targeting neurological, oncology, and immuno-related diseases.

products.name: Sugar Substitute
products.description: Research-stage new sugar substitute product under development by the Biotechnology division.

products.name: Multi-use Fragrance
products.description: Research-stage multi-use fragrance product with insect repellent and antimicrobial applications under DSS BioHealth Security.

products.name: Commercial Lending Products
products.description: Business lines of credit, land development financing, inventory financing, equipment financing, and third-party loan servicing via American Pacific Financial.

products.name: Broker-Dealer Services
products.description: FINRA-registered broker-dealer services including underwriting and selling group membership for IPOs and follow-on offerings via Sentinel Brokers Company.

partnerships.description: Impact BioMedical Inc. entered a definitive reverse merger agreement with Dr. Ashleys Limited targeting a combined NYSE American-listed public entity.
